commands.review_summary:
The PR adds two serialized Swift performance regression tests for cached unchanged-session scans and memoized appended-row priority-turn SQLite scans.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds guards for historical performance regressions rather than reporting a current product failure. The proposed gates have concrete deterministic state checks and repeated local timing results.
